platform_insights.facebook: Authentic hero images with bold text overlays drive shares and comments in competitive swim communities; gear/equipment detail posts perform well in post-competition periods as athletes reflect on season and gear choices; community-focused content and performance education remain highest-engagement pillars
platform_insights.instagram: Dark cinematic product photography with high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting is resonating strongly with performance sports brands in 2026; creator-led storytelling and refined minimal aesthetics outperform generic stock imagery; gear detail shots with dramatic pool lighting stopping the scroll; refined tactile presentation of technical performance fabrics is trending
platform_insights.tiktok: April 2026 TikTok favours specificity and self-awareness over high production value; photo carousel formats gaining traction in niche sports communities; gear-detail content combined with performance science hooks performing well in competitive swim circles; short punchy text overlays on moody images driving saves

recommended_visual_style: dark cinematic, high contrast chiaroscuro, sleek racing swimsuit submerged in deep teal pool water with dramatic orange-amber overhead spotlights, fabric texture visible
recommended_overlay_style: short punchy 4–5 word performance statement matching brand voice overlay examples
trending_hooks: Your gear is either working for you — or against you
What your suit does when the race is on the line
key_insight: Post-nationals period (NZ Age Groups just concluded April 8–12) is prime timing for race suit quality and performance fabric messaging — athletes are reflecting on their season and evaluating gear; gear_closeup image type pairs perfectly with 2026 product photography trends favouring high-res fabric detail and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting
seasonal_context: NZ Age Group Championships concluded April 8–12 at Hawke's Bay Regional Aquatic Centre; Northern Zone Development Meets scheduled April 19 — post-nationals window ideal for race gear reflection and upgrade messaging
